title: Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (As Applicable to Co-operative Societies) – The Industrial Co-operative Bank Ltd., Guwahati – Extension of period
description: The Reserve Bank of India issued Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 to The Industrial Co-operative Bank Ltd., Guwahati vide Directive No.GWH.DOS.ADM.No.S103/01-10-101/2025-26 dated July 03, 2025 for a period of six months up to close of business on January 04, 2026 which was last extended up to close of business on April 04, 2026 vide Directive No.DOR.MON./D-45/12-29-104/2025-26 dated December 24, 2025.
